cells.rationale: Security-critical guard-lexer hardening against a CVE deny corpus that must never flip, where a wrongly-loosened POSIX/ANSI-C boundary opens a bypass — a subtle load-bearing security invariant plus contract-shaped manifest/denial changes across multiple guards, a hard opus gate best served at the security-review ceiling.
